# Daily Report — 2026-05-19

## Task Completed
Added `list_articles_by_category` tool to `knowledge_base.py`. The tool accepts a
category by **name or sys_id**: when a name is supplied it first performs a
`kb_category` lookup to resolve the name to a sys_id, then queries `kb_knowledge`
with that filter. Compared to the generic `list_articles` tool this exposes richer
per-article metadata (author, view_count, keywords, article_type) and an optional
`include_body` flag that pulls the full article text. An optional `knowledge_base`
parameter narrows the category lookup when multiple KBs share category names.

Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and `tool_packages.yaml`
(service_desk, knowledge_author, full packages).

- Total tests: 1122 (+ 10 new)

- All passing: yes
